text:
Created attachment 169160
dmesg log

I have kernel version r297692 from the latest RPI2 image available on FreeBSD servers.

I now have these lines in my dmesg log which makes me wonder if there is a bug:

local_intc0: Spurious interrupt detected
...
ukphy0: <Generic IEEE 802.3u media interface> PHY 1 on miibus0
ukphy0:
nonelocal_intc0: , 10baseTSpurious interrupt detected
, 10baseT-FDXlocal_intc0: , 100baseTXSpurious interrupt detected
, 100baseTX-FDXlocal_intc0: , autoSpurious interrupt detected

Full dmesg log attached.
